entities.woman: a woman waving on the platform

scenes.title: The Train Station
scenes.background_prompt: A small train station with a single platform, a covered waiting area with a wooden bench, a timetable board, flower boxes, and railway tracks extending into the distance. No people, no trains.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A small train station on a clear day. A bright red express train speeds through the station from left to right, its cars a blur of motion, windows flashing as they pass. Wind from the train rustles the flowers in the hanging flower boxes on the platform edge. A woman in a long green coat and a white scarf stands on the platform behind the yellow safety line, waving her right hand high at someone visible through one of the passing windows. Her coat and scarf flutter in the train's wind. A wooden bench under the covered waiting area sits behind her. A timetable board shows departure times. The railway tracks extend into the distance, converging at a vanishing point between green fields.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place train speeding through the station from left to right, cars a blur of motion. Place woman on the platform behind the yellow safety line, standing and waving her right hand high, coat and scarf fluttering in the wind.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a rectangular wooden planter box is filled with green leaves and several small red and yellow flowers. Behind the planter, the edge of a stone platform is visible, marked by a solid yellow safety line running parallel to the tracks. A small wooden train station shelter stands on the platform, featuring a flat, slightly slanted roof supported by wooden pillars. On the left interior wall of the shelter, a white timetable board with a grid is mounted. Below the timetable, a long wooden bench with rounded ends sits against the back wall. Two hanging baskets filled with green foliage and small orange flowers are suspended from the roof's support beams. Standing on the platform, just outside the shelter and behind the yellow line, is a woman. She has brown hair and is wearing a blue jacket over a yellow and white striped shirt, brown trousers, green shoes with white soles, and a red and white checkered scarf. She is facing right, waving her left hand toward the passing train with a smile on her face. Two parallel metal train tracks run diagonally from the bottom left toward the middle right, laid on dark brown wooden sleepers set into a bed of grey gravel. A red steam train is moving quickly from left to right on the tracks. The locomotive is a deep red color with gold trim and a large black cowcatcher at the front. It has a single large headlight, a gold bell on top, and visible wheels and connecting rods that appear blurred to indicate motion. Several red passenger cars with blue-tinted windows are attached behind the locomotive. Behind the station shelter, there are several large, rounded green and yellow-green trees. To the right of the woman, more bushes with yellow flowers are visible. Further right, beyond the train, is a grassy field filled with small yellow flowers and green bushes. The sky above is a light blue, filled with soft, white, puffy clouds, with the warm light and long shadows suggesting it is either early morning or late afternoon.
